headline: Lamb Weston May Have Higher Margins In 2027 (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Lamb Weston (LW) upgraded to Buy: expect FY2027 margin expansion from lower costs, activism-driven SG&A cuts, and buybacks. Read more macro analysis here.
